'''Shesstellek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] spice merchant active in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]]. He was extremely thin, and always seemed nervous and edgy.

He was an associate of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tern Ashandrik]]. He was initially afraid of Tern and refused to help a group of bounty hunters who were searching for him, but later relented and gave them a lead to Tern for 1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. He used this money to flee Seregar.
